title: No Baby Zombie
description: No Baby Zombie is a lightweight datapack that removes baby zombies from your world.
body:
![Baby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8bdf9c2d9be4fd6960fb28713b9760990f854e0_0.webp)

**No Baby Zombie keeps combat fair by removing baby zombies from your world.**

📝 Features
1. Every zombie you meet is full-sized—no more tiny speed demons.
1. Just add the pack and play; no menus, switches, or commands.
1. Great for singleplayer and servers, built for Minecraft 1.21.x.

📥 Installation
- How to Install (Datapack)
- Download the .zip file — do not unzip it.
- Singleplayer: put the file here, then open the world and run /reload
- Windows: %appdata%\.minecraft\saves\<YourWorld>\datapacks
- macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/saves/<YourWorld>/datapacks
- Linux: ~/.minecraft/saves/<YourWorld>/datapacks
- (For a new world: Create New World → Data Packs → Open Pack Folder → move the zip → Done.)
- Servers (Vanilla/Paper/Spigot): place the .zip in <server>/<world>/datapacks/ and run /reload or restart.
- Verify: run /datapack list — you should see No Baby Zombie listed as enabled.
